2606.24596.title: To Compare, or Not to Compare: On Methodological Practices in Evaluating Social Bias
2606.24596.paper_summary: As Large Language Models are increasingly deployed in critical applications, robustly evaluating their social biases is paramount. However, the current literature suffers from widespread methodological fragmentation, which yields contradictory conclusions. This stems largely from ignoring the structural framing of benchmark-level evaluations. To resolve this, we introduce a unified and controllable framework that standardizes heterogeneous benchmarks to systematically contrast isolated demographic assessments with forced-choice comparative settings. Crucially, this allows us to disentangle the confounding effects of Chain-of-Thought reasoning, neutral fallback options, and other structural artifacts in social bias evaluations. Our evaluation across multiple model families reveals a massive, systematic paradigm gap: while isolated assessments limit prejudice activation, comparative settings act as aggressive catalysts for latent discrimination, a shift primarily driven by underspecified contexts. Alarmingly, CoT reasoning exacerbates social biases under comparative settings, and this systemic bias persists as a deterministic prejudice even when models are provided neutral fallback options or claim to answer randomly. Finally, we demonstrate that this comparative prejudice is a generalized phenomenon that scales positively with model size. Ultimately, we offer a crucial methodological guideline: while researchers must leverage comparative settings to robustly audit hidden biases, practitioners cannot safely rely on comparative deployments in ambiguous real-world tasks.
2606.24596.paper_summary_zh: 隨著大型語言模型在關鍵應用中的日益部署，穩健地評估它們的社會偏見變得至關重要。<lb/>然而，目前的文獻存在廣泛的方法論碎片化問題，這導致了矛盾的結論。<lb/>這主要源於忽視基準級評估的結構性框架。<lb/>為了解決這個問題，我們提出了一個統一且可控的框架，將異質基準標準化，以系統性地對比孤立的人口評估與強制選擇比較設置。<lb/>關鍵在於，這使我們能夠理清思維鏈推理、中立備選方案以及社會偏見評估中的其他結構性工件的混淆效應。<lb/>我們在多個模型家族中的評估揭示了一個巨大的系統性範式差距：雖然孤立評估限制了偏見的激活，但比較設置則作為潛在歧視的激進催化劑，這一變化主要是由於不明確的上下文驅動的。<lb/>令人擔憂的是，在比較設置下，思維鏈推理加劇了社會偏見，而這種系統性偏見即使在模型提供中立備選方案或聲稱隨機回答的情況下，仍然作為一種決定論的偏見持續存在。<lb/>最後，我們展示了這種比較偏見是一種普遍現象，並隨著模型大小的增加而正向擴展。<lb/>最終，我們提供了一個重要的方法論指導：雖然研究者必須利用比較設置來穩健地審核隱藏的偏見，但從業者在模糊的現實任務中不能安全地依賴比較部署。
2606.24596.author: Federico Marcuzzi et.al.
2606.24596.authors: Federico Marcuzzi, Xuefei Ning, Roy Schwartz, Iryna Gurevych
